name: opencode-quality-assistant-workspace
description: Development workspace for the OpenCode-bound quality assistant.

scripts.lint:engine: cd engine && python -m ruff check src\quality_adapters src\dfmea_cli src\quality_core src\quality_methods tests
scripts.compile:engine: cd engine && python -m compileall -q src tests
scripts.check:engine: npm run lint:engine && npm run compile:engine && npm run test:engine
